courseName: Turbine Aeroplane Aerodynamics Structures and Systems 3
deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA PART 66 MODULE 11A TURBINE AEROPLANE AERODYNAMICS STRUCTURES AND SYSTEMS
learningOutcomes:
Be able to know, understand, explain and apply knowledge for Flight Controls system,
Fuel system, Hydraulic System and Landing Gear System and Have a good attitude to work
neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to know and understand the Flight Controls system, Fuel System, Hydraulic
System and Landing Gear System.
2. Be able to explain and the Flight Controls system, Fuel System, Hydraulic System
and Landing Gear System.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge for Flight Controls system, Fuel system, Hydraulic
System and Landing Gear System.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the Flight Controls system, Fuel system,
Hydraulic System and Landing Gear System.
2. Apply knowledge for Flight Controls system Fuel system, Hydraulic System and
Landing Gear System Controls in practical.
3. Apply knowledge of aircraft Flight Controls system, Fuel system, Hydraulic System
and Landing Gear System in higher education.
description:
To study and practice about large aeroplanes how to system work and how to practical
for safety when operate of Flight Controls system ATA 27, Fuel system ATA 28, Hydraulic
System ATA 29 and Landing Gear System ATA32.
